title: Tool Adapter Integrations (Claude Code / Codex / Cursor)
description: Adapters bridge the Evolver agent to external AI coding tools (Claude Code, Codex, Cursor) via hook-based event lifecycle management.
actors: hookAdapter (orchestrator — detects platform, routes to adapter)
FileSystem (config files, hook scripts, markdown docs)

use_cases.name: Auto-detect platform
use_cases.description: detectPlatform(cwd) scans for .cursor/.claude/.codex dirs in cwd then homedir; returns platform id or null

use_cases.name: Resolve config root
use_cases.description: resolveConfigRoot(platformId, cwd) finds project-level or user-level config directory

use_cases.name: Load platform adapter
use_cases.description: loadAdapter(platformId) dynamically requires cursor/claudeCode/codex module; returns null for unknown

use_cases.name: Install hooks — Claude Code
use_cases.description: Creates .claude/settings.json with hook commands, copies 3 hook scripts to .claude/hooks/, injects Evolver section into CLAUDE.md. Skips if _evolver_managed already set (unless --force).

use_cases.name: Uninstall hooks — Claude Code
use_cases.description: Filters out evolver-session*/evolver-signal* commands from settings.json hooks, removes hook scripts, strips EVOLVER_MARKER section from CLAUDE.md

use_cases.name: Install hooks — Codex
use_cases.description: Creates .codex/hooks.json + ensures config.toml has [features] codex_hooks=true, copies hook scripts, injects Evolver section into AGENTS.md.

use_cases.name: Uninstall hooks — Codex
use_cases.description: Filters evolver commands from hooks.json, removes hook scripts, strips EVOLVER_MARKER from AGENTS.md

use_cases.name: Install hooks — Cursor
use_cases.description: Creates .cursor/hooks.json (schema version:1), copies hook scripts. Supports user-level install (configRoot === os.homedir()). No markdown injection.
use_cases.cursor_specific: isUserLevel flag changes script base path; loop_limit:1 on stop hook

use_cases.name: Merge JSON config file (atomic write)
use_cases.description: deepMerge existing JSON with patch, sets _evolver_managed=true, writes via .tmp + rename for atomicity

use_cases.name: Copy hook scripts to platform dir
use_cases.description: Copies evolver-session-start.js, evolver-signal-detect.js, evolver-session-end.js from src/adapters/scripts/ to platform hooks dir; chmod 755

use_cases.name: Inject evolution memory section into markdown
use_cases.description: appendSectionToFile() checks for EVOLVER_MARKER; skips if present, otherwise appends section explaining hooks + gep_recall/gep_record_outcome usage

use_cases.name: Remove evolver hooks from JSON config
use_cases.description: Reads config JSON, filters out evolver-session*/evolver-signal* commands per event, deletes empty keys, removes _evolver_managed marker

use_cases.name: Remove hook scripts
use_cases.description: Deletes the 3 evolver script files from platform hooks dir

use_cases.name: Orchestrate setup (entry point)
use_cases.description: setupHooks({ platform, cwd, force, uninstall, evolverRoot }) — detects platform, resolves config root, loads adapter, delegates to adapter.install or adapter.uninstall
use_cases.method: setupHooks({ platform, cwd, force, uninstall, evolverRoot })

key_relationships: hookAdapter orchestrates all adapters via setupHooks()
claudeCode depends_on hookAdapter: mergeJsonFile, copyHookScripts, appendSectionToFile, removeHookScripts
codex depends_on hookAdapter: mergeJsonFile, copyHookScripts, appendSectionToFile, removeHookScripts
cursor depends_on hookAdapter: mergeJsonFile, copyHookScripts, removeEvolverHooks, removeHookScripts
hookAdapter loads adapters dynamically via loadAdapter(platformId)
PLATFORMS registry in hookAdapter maps platform ids to configDir and detector paths

platform_differences.claudeCode: settings.json under .claude/, hooks use PascalCase keys (SessionStart/PostToolUse/Stop), CLAUDE.md injection
platform_differences.codex: hooks.json + config.toml under .codex/, PascalCase hook keys, AGENTS.md injection, ensureConfigToml() unique step
platform_differences.cursor: hooks.json (version:1) under .cursor/, camelCase keys (sessionStart/afterFileEdit/stop), loop_limit on stop, user-level install supported, no markdown injection

hook_scripts: evolver-session-start.js — inject recent evolution memory at session start
evolver-signal-detect.js — detect evolution signals during file edits (Write events)
evolver-session-end.js — record outcomes at session end
guard_conditions: _evolver_managed flag in config JSON prevents re-installation unless --force
EVOLVER_MARKER HTML comment prevents duplicate markdown section injection
codex_hooks=true in config.toml is idempotent via regex check
